name: Tortilla Dumpling Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. See Shrimp soup or Sowest2 for Casera Sauce Recipe.
2. Heat Casera Sauce and broth to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan.
3. Mix remaining ingredients except milk; stir in milk.
4. Shape dough by teaspoonfuls into small balls.
5. Add dough balls to the broth mixture.
6. Cover and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with chopped green onion, if desired.
